1.0.0: About modal with version and mamgain.app link
Support Development link in Help menu
Check for Updates with auto-updater and progress
Expanded User Guide - Shortcuts, File Types, Portable Mode, Snippets, Session and Recovery
1.0.2: Improved auto-update checking so the dialog no longer stays stuck on Checking
Added clearer updater messages for packaged and development builds
Added timeout handling when the update server or GitHub release metadata cannot be reached
Rebuilt Windows setup and portable release artifacts for the updater flow
1.0.3: Added changelog support to the Check for Updates dialog
The update dialog can now show release notes for the installed or available version
Changelog data loads from the public mnotepadx-releases repository without blocking the modal
Changelog loading fails silently if release notes are not available
1.0.4: Added submenu support to the titlebar App Menu
Grouped Save and Save As under a File menu submenu
Grouped Find commands under an Edit menu submenu
Added a Recent Files submenu with filename and folder details
Added Clear Recent Files support from the App Menu
1.0.5: Fixed App Menu overflow when the window height is small
The App Menu now scrolls vertically instead of being cut off
Added subtle thin scrollbars for long menu panels
Submenus now scroll when needed and flip upward near the bottom edge
The App Menu closes cleanly when the window is resized
